profile.personality: The Abrotanum constitutional type is a chilly, sensitive individual prone to suppression and metastasis of disease states. They tend toward wasting and debility, particularly in the lower extremities, and are aggravated by cold, damp conditions and nighttime.
profile.mental_state: Marked by anxiety and trembling, especially when physical symptoms are suppressed or shift location. The mental state reflects the body's pattern of incomplete resolution, with restlessness and apprehension accompanying sudden internal changes such as cardiac distress following checked diarrhea.
profile.emotional_pattern: Deep-seated anxiety tied to physical vulnerability, with a sense of fragility and foreboding when symptoms migrate or are suppressed. The emotional landscape mirrors the remedy's core theme of metastasis — emotions shift and transfer rather than resolve, creating an undercurrent of unease and instability.

rubric_passages.Generalities: The Abrot. patient is sensitive to cold air and cold damp weather. He suffers much from backaches, and his symptoms are worse during the night.
rubric_passages.Clinical: This a very valuable remedy should be more frequently used. It is indicated in such conditions as are cured by Bryonia and Rhus tox., but its symptoms mark out its own individual cases.
rubric_passages.Clinical, emaciation: In marasmus of children it is a very useful remedy and not unfrequently indicated. The emaciation begins in the lower limbs and gradually spreads upward, so that the face is the last affected; that is the opposite of Lycopodium, Natrum mur. and Psorinum.
rubric_passages.Clinical, metastasis: Metastasis is a marked feature in Abrot. The changing of one so called disease into another always calls attention to Abrotanum.
rubric_passages.Chest: It has cured pleurisy after Bryonia, which seemed indicated, had failed. A woman lying in bed with dyspnoea, anxiety, cold sweat and pain in the heart was surrounded by friends to see her die.
rubric_passages.Extremities: It was learned that she had suffered for many months with a rheumatism in one knee, that she had used crutches to get about the house, and that she had recently been speedily cured (?) by a strong liniment only a few days before this attack.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Inflammation of the parotid (mumps) changing to tests or mammae is generally cured by Carbo v. or Pulsatilla, but Abrot, has cured when these remedies have failed.
rubric_passages.Mind: Rheumatic conditions with heart irritation; epistaxis; bloody urine; anxiety and trembling, when there has been a history of diarrhoea.
rubric_passages.Rectum: A suddenly checked diarrhea followed by piles and acute rheumatism, with bleedings, as mentioned above, is further argument in favor of this idea.
rubric_passages.Respiration: A woman lying in bed with dyspnoea, anxiety, cold sweat and pain in the heart was surrounded by friends to see her die.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: A woman lying in bed with dyspnoea, anxiety, cold sweat and pain in the heart was surrounded by friends to see her die.
rubric_passages.Stomach: It has caused and cured burning ulcerative pains in the stomach with suspicious vomiting.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: It has caused and cured burning ulcerative pains in the stomach with suspicious vomiting.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain, burning: It has caused and cured burning ulcerative pains in the stomach with suspicious vomiting.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: He suffers much from backaches, and his symptoms are worse during the night.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, heart: A suddenly checked diarrhoea will be followed by violent cardiac symptoms; it is much like Ledum, Aurum and Kalmia.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: Rheumatic conditions with heart irritation; epistaxis; bloody urine; anxiety and trembling, when there has been a history of diarrhoea. A suddenly checked diarrhoea will be followed by violent cardiac symptoms.
rubric_passages.Chest, pain: A woman lying in bed with dyspnoea, anxiety, cold sweat and pain in the heart was surrounded by friends to see her die.
rubric_passages.Face: The emaciation begins in the lower limbs and gradually spreads upward, so that the face is the last affected.

profile.personality: A pale, sickly, and profoundly weakened constitutional type who has endured chronic debility for many years, often with an inherited predisposition to wasting diseases. These individuals are anaemic, emaciated, and physically depleted, yet find paradoxical relief through eliminative processes such as diarrhea.
profile.mental_state: Marked confusion of mind to the point of not recognizing her own children and forgetting recent events. The mental state is characterized by a foggy, disoriented consciousness arising from deep constitutional weakness and anaemia.
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by anticipatory anxiety and anguish — constantly borrowing trouble and expecting something bad to happen. Peevish, irritable, and given to complaining, with a tendency toward fainting spells that reflect the underlying emotional and physical fragility.

profile.personality: A vigorous, plethoric, robust individual with strong vitality and active circulation. These are sensitive, excitable people—particularly women and children—who react violently and suddenly to external stressors such as cold winds, shock, or fright.
profile.mental_state: The mind is dominated by intense nervous irritation and excitement, with a characteristic prediction of the hour of one's own death. Delirium, when present, is violent and acute rather than sluggish, marked by screaming, moaning, and an overwhelming sense that something awful is happening.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional state is extreme fear and anguish—specifically an intense, all-consuming fear of death that is visibly depicted on the countenance. This is accompanied by great restlessness, irritability, loss of affection for friends, and sudden weeping, with all emotions expressed at maximum intensity and violence.

rubric_passages.Back: Tearing pains down the spine. Painful, stiff neck. Crawling in the spine like insects.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Tearing pains down the spine. Painful, stiff neck.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Inflammation of the bladder, with cutting, tearing pains. Burning pains with burning urine. Urine is hot, dark, colored red; red and clear, or bloody.
rubric_passages.Chest: Aconite produces a very rapid inflammation of the viscera of the chest, of the pleura, of the lungs, of the mucous membrane lining the air passages. In pneumonia we have this dyspnoea, the suddenness with which it comes on. In these chest troubles there is much pain. Shooting, burning, tearing pains, and the patient is compelled to lie in a somewhat elevated position, on the back.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Aconite has such a sudden violent cardiac irritation, pulse fluttering, weak, full and bounding; sits up in bed, grasps the throat, wants everything thrown off. Sudden attacks of pain in the heart, with dyspnoea.
rubric_passages.Chill: Vigorous persons get into a draft and get a chill that will bring on Aconite symptoms. The pulse in the highest form of the fever is full and bounding; strong, vigorous pulse. When the attack is first coming on and the awful anxiety and nerve tension are present the pulse is very small, but after the heart's action is well established, then the pulse becomes stronger.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Trembling of the hands associated with these sudden acute attacks. Creeping pains in the fingers associated with these sudden acute inflammatory attacks. Rheumatic conditions of the joints. Those that come on as a first attack. Not old rheumatic and gouty attacks, but those that come on as acute rheumatism, those that come on from sudden exposure to cold, from long rides in a dry, cold wind.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: Cold as ice. Feet cold as ice. Hot palms. Hot hands and cold feet are sometimes present.
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis: Numbness along the course of the nerves, from cold, from exposure. Numbness and tingling, along the course of the nerves, especially those that run close to the surface.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Attacks come on suddenly from exposure to a dry, cold wind. It is suited to the complaints that come on suddenly from the very cold weather of winter, or from the intensely hot weather of summer. All these inflammatory conditions are attended with great excitement of the circulation, violent action of the heart, a tremendous turmoil of the brain, a violent shock, with intense fear.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Burning is a symptom that runs all through the remedy, you will find it descriptive of all the pains. Burning in the head, burning along the course of nerves, burning in the spine, burning in fever, sometimes burning as if covered with pepper.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: The woman is a natural Aconite patient, with her sympathetic natural sensitiveness. Fear will often cause abortion, but when Aconite is given early enough it will check the abortion that comes from fear. Inflammation of the genitals in plethoric women.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: We will have the stitching, burning, tearing pains of Aconite sometimes following fear or sudden emotion. Violent after-pains. Shooting, tearing after-pains, with febrile conditions.
rubric_passages.Head: The headaches can hardly be described, they come with such violence. Tearing burning in the brain, in the scalp, attended with fear, with fever, with anguish; headache from taking cold, from suppressing catarrh in the nose. Violent headache over the eyes. Congestion of the brain, with congestive headache, with anxiety, with hot face.
rubric_passages.Mind: The patient feels the violence of his sickness, for he is under great nervous irritation and excitement. Fear is depicted upon his countenance, and the heart's action is so overwhelming the first thing he thinks of is that he must die; this must mean death, which he fears. When we see this intense fear, this awful anxiety, great restlessness, the violence and the suddenness of these attacks, we have a case, perhaps, that is dying from the poison of Aconite, or one who needs Aconite.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: There is moaning and irritability, anger, throwing things away, all attended with the violence and anxiety.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: When we see this intense fear, this awful anxiety, great restlessness, the violence and the suddenness of these attacks, we have a case, perhaps, that is dying from the poison of Aconite, or one who needs Aconite. Anxious restlessness covers nearly all of these things.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Oh, what a comforting remedy it is for toothache. The violence of the toothache; again the same old story, from the dry, cold winds, plethoric individuals, with hollow teeth, pain intense, cutting, shooting pains in the teeth. Disturbances of taste, disordered stomach. Everything tastes bitter, except water; and, oh, how the Aconite patient longs for water.
rubric_passages.Mouth, dryness: Aconite conditions are dry as a usual thing, or there is only a little watery discharge. Sensation of dryness of the whole chest, sensation of dryness in the larynx and throat.
rubric_passages.Rectum: It may be a catarrhal condition of the lower portion of the colon, or a catarrhal condition of the rectum, when we will have a dysentery. In dysentery, that which is found in the commode is almost pure blood, blood and a little slime. It seems impossible for him to leave the commode.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: The whole body is in a state of anguish, but the tenesmus and cramp, the urging to stool are simply terrible.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Aconite is full of disturbances of respiration, dyspnoea from contraction of the smaller bronchial tubes, which we find resembles asthma. Breathing short, labored, anxious, quick. Sits up straight and can hardly breathe. Anguish with dyspnoea.
rubric_passages.Sleep: The child is put to bed and rouses up from the first sleep, perhaps at 9 or 10 or 1 o'clock, grasps the throat, coughs violently, a croupy, choking cough, with hoarse bark. If he goes to sleep he will have spasm of the larynx, with dryness of the larynx. He goes to sleep and the larynx becomes dry and he wakes up and grasps his larynx; he thinks he is going to choke.
rubric_passages.Sleep, restless: Great restlessness with fever. Crying and restlessness. Excessive restlessness.
rubric_passages.Stomach: With the stomach symptoms what an anxious patient we have! The pains are dreadful. Burning pains, tearing pains, with anxiety, with restlessness, with fever, coming on from taking cold - not from overeating, but from taking cold, which has settled in the stomach. Vomiting and retching, tearing, as it were, the very inside out by the awful retching.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: Burning pains, tearing pains, with anxiety, with restlessness, with fever, coming on from taking cold - not from overeating, but from taking cold, which has settled in the stomach.
rubric_passages.Stomach, thirst: Oh, how the Aconite patient longs for water. It seems almost impossible for him to get water enough and it agrees well. Pours down great quantities of cold water.

profile.personality: A chilly, hypersensitive woman prone to hysteria and rheumatic conditions, whose physical and mental symptoms constantly alternate and shift. She is restless, fidgety, and deeply impressionable, with her voluntary nervous system in continual turmoil.
profile.mental_state: Overwhelmed by a sensation as if a black cloud has settled over her, with changeable moods swinging between deep gloom and nervous excitability. She is suspicious, fearful of death, full of anguish, and may refuse medicine out of distrust, with mental symptoms worsening as physical complaints improve.
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by an overwhelming, moping sadness that descends suddenly and may be triggered by motion, fear, excitement, or cold. She sits silently in grief and breaks into tears when questioned, yet her emotional state is unstable—shifting rapidly between sorrowful withdrawal and hysterical agitation.

profile.personality: A sluggish, venous constitution prone to congestion and plethora, with a temperament that is slow and passive rather than active or violent. The individual is averse to work and prefers to keep busy with physical activity, which paradoxically relieves their symptoms despite their reluctance to exert themselves.
profile.mental_state: Marked confusion of mind, especially upon waking, with bewilderment about surroundings and inability to recognize familiar people or places. Memory is impaired, thinking is clouded, and there is a general dullness of intellect that worsens during periods of venous congestion and during sleep.
profile.emotional_pattern: Deep-seated irritability forms the core emotional state, flaring whenever the person's desires or will are thwarted, combined with persistent sadness stemming from an unfulfilled sense of lacking. The emotional pattern is one of passive suffering and melancholy rather than explosive anger, with depression intensifying during rest and improving with physical exertion.

rubric_passages.Back: The back is the seat of much trouble, especially low down in the back, through the sacrum and hips; although there is also aching all along the back and pain in the back of the neck.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Constant dull backache; walking is almost impossible; scarcely able to rise or walk after sitting. You will see one suffering from the Aesculus backache, on attempting to rise from sitting, make many painful efforts before he finally succeeds.
rubric_passages.Extremities: A peculiar kind of plethora is found running through this remedy, a vascular fullness which affects the extremities and the whole body. Fullness of the hands and feet, not the fullness that pits upon pressure, that we call oedema, but a tenseness.
rubric_passages.Generalities: It is a general venous stasis, and is sometimes worse in sleep, worse from lying, better from bodily exertion. The symptoms pass away after considerable exertion; moving about, doing something, keeping busy relieves.
rubric_passages.Rectum: We find in the text over two pages devoted to the symptoms of the rectum. Great soreness; much pain; urging to stool; dark stool followed by white one, showing the liver engorgement.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: Digestion is slow, the bowels are constipated and there is protrusion of the rectum when at stool. Chronic constipation.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: Sticking, jagging, burning pains, as if the rectum were full of sticks. Great suffering with blind hemorrhoids.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain, burning: Sticking, jagging, burning pains, as if the rectum were full of sticks.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Constant distress and burning in the stomach. Inclination to vomit. It has a great disturbance of digestion. As soon as the patient has swallowed the food, or a little while after, it becomes sour and he eructates it, until after a while he has emptied the stomach of its contents.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: After eating there is distress in the bowels and rectum. Sticking, jagging, burning pains.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It is one of the most frequently indicated remedies in the hemorrhoidal constitution, as it used to be called.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, liver: The liver is full of suffering. If we read the symptoms of the right hypochondrium, of the abdomen and of the rectum, we shall see from the study of these that there must be a marked portal stasis.
rubric_passages.Back, sacrum: This pain through the sacrum and into the hips, when walking, is a striking feature of Aesculus, so striking that you may expect it to be present even when there are no hemorrhoids.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: The abdomen is full of troubles. If we read the symptoms of the right hypochondrium, of the abdomen and of the rectum, we shall see from the study of these that there must be a marked portal stasis.
rubric_passages.Throat: This remedy produces inflammation of the throat, the characteristic being that it is very dark. It has the tendency to produce varicose veins and ulceration, and round about these we have marked duskiness.
rubric_passages.Back, pain, sacral region: This pain through the sacrum and into the hips, when walking, is a striking feature of Aesculus, so striking that you may expect it to be present even when there are no hemorrhoids. Constant dull backache; walking is almost impossible; scarcely able to rise or walk after sitting.
rubric_passages.Rectum, hemorrhoids: Great suffering with blind hemorrhoids. The hemorrhoidal veins are all distended and ulcerate. The stool becomes jammed into the rectum, against these distended veins, and then ulceration takes place with bleeding and great suffering. This remedy is often supposed to be suitable to hemorrhoids that do not bleed, but it cures bleeding piles also.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain, liver: The liver is full of suffering. Most troublesome hemorrhoids with fullness of the right hypochondrium.
rubric_passages.Back, pain, aching, dull pain: Constant dull backache; walking is almost impossible; scarcely able to rise or walk after sitting. You will see one suffering from the Aesculus backache, on attempting to rise from sitting, make many painful efforts before he finally succeeds.

profile.personality: The Aethusa constitution is marked by an inability to assimilate and process experience, much like the infant who takes in milk but cannot digest it. These individuals are overwhelmed by input—whether food, stimulation, or mental demands—and collapse into exhaustion and withdrawal after even modest engagement with the world.
profile.mental_state: The mental state is characterized by acute cerebral disturbance that shuts down normal function; thinking and concentration cease under stress, particularly in hot weather or overstimulation. There is a striking incapacity to retain or integrate information, as if the mind, like the stomach, rejects what it receives. Delirium and excitement may appear suddenly but give way rapidly to stupor and prolonged, exhausted sleep.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional pattern is one of overwhelming anxiety coupled with utter helplessness, expressed through a deathly countenance, sunken features, and cold clammy extremities rather than through words. There is a cyclical rhythm of desperate need followed by violent rejection and collapse—reaching out for nourishment only to be unable to hold it. The emotional life is reactive and acute rather than deeply internalized, surfacing visibly on the face and body before the patient can articulate distress.

rubric_passages.Generalities: It applies to the cases that come on very suddenly in hot weather in infancy, with extreme prostration.
rubric_passages.Mind: It has delirium, it has excitement, it has mental disturbances of various kinds, but they are acute and accompany the brain troubles.
rubric_passages.Rectum: the bowels become relaxed, and everything put into the stomach either comes up or goes right through.
rubric_passages.Stomach: digestion has absolutely ceased from brain trouble and from excitement.
rubric_passages.Face: The child has the appearance as if it were dying, pale Hippocratic face, there is a whitish-blue pallor around the lips, the eyes are sunken and there is a sunken condition around the nose.
rubric_passages.Stomach, indigestion (includes complaint: It has cured dyspepsia from constant feeding, in those nibblers, those hungry fellows who are always eating, always nibbling, always taking crackers in their pockets until there comes a time when the stomach ceases to act.
rubric_passages.Mind, unconsciousness: The child sinks into an exhausted sleep. It wakes up and again fills the stomach with milk which comes up again in a few minutes, partly in curd and partly liquid, and again there is the awful exhaustion, deathly appearance and prolonged sleep.
rubric_passages.Stomach, vomiting: this little one fills its stomach with milk and almost before it has had time to coagulate or form into curds the milk comes up partly in curds and partly liquid, and accompanying the vomiting there is a thin, yellow greenish, slimy stool.
rubric_passages.Face, expression: deathly countenance, and the sweat, exhaustion and sleep.
rubric_passages.Rectum, diarrhea: accompanying the vomiting there is a thin, yellow greenish, slimy stool.
rubric_passages.Stomach, vomiting, milk: this little one fills its stomach with milk and almost before it has had time to coagulate or form into curds the milk comes up partly in curds and partly liquid.
rubric_passages.Generalities, food: Aethusa suits improperly fed babies. It is at the head of the list of medicines for that condition; that is, when digestion has absolutely ceased from brain trouble.
rubric_passages.Face, drawn: the eyes are sunken and there is a sunken condition around the nose.
rubric_passages.Face, expression, anxious: The mother is astonished and sends for the doctor hurriedly. The child sinks into an exhausted sleep.
rubric_passages.Face, hippocratic: The child has the appearance as if it were dying, pale Hippocratic face, there is a whitish-blue pallor around the lips, the eyes are sunken and there is a sunken condition around the nose.
rubric_passages.Rectum, cholera: Before Aethusa was known a certain class of cases of cholera infantum, and vomiting and diarrhea in children, all resulted fatally, because there was no remedy that looked like such serious cases.
rubric_passages.Rectum, cholera, infantum: Before Aethusa was known a certain class of cases of cholera infantum, and vomiting and diarrhea in children, all resulted fatally, because there was no remedy that looked like such serious cases. Death is stamped on the face from the beginning.
rubric_passages.Rectum, diarrhea, children, in: vomiting and diarrhea in children, all resulted fatally, because there was no remedy that looked like such serious cases.
this little one fills its stomach with milk and almost before it has had time to coagulate or form into curds the milk comes up partly in curds and partly liquid, and accompanying the vomiting there is a thin, yellow greenish, slimy stool.
rubric_passages.Stomach, indigestion (includes complaint: It also suits cases of indigestion from head troubles, with hot head, vomiting, exhaustion, sweat and long sleep.
rubric_passages.Stomach, vomiting, milk, after: It wakes up and again fills the stomach with milk which comes up again in a few minutes, partly in curd and partly liquid, and again there is the awful exhaustion, deathly appearance and prolonged sleep.
rubric_passages.Stomach, vomiting, milk, curdled: the milk comes up partly in curds and partly liquid.
rubric_passages.Generalities, food, milk: this little one fills its stomach with milk and almost before it has had time to coagulate or form into curds the milk comes up partly in curds and partly liquid.

profile.personality: A nervous, chilly, and clumsy individual who alternates between sluggish stupidity in the morning and brilliant, poetical excitement in the evening. They are changeable, sometimes mild and placid, other times obstinate and conceited, with a tendency toward silly, foolish behavior reminiscent of intoxication.
profile.mental_state: The mind develops slowly with difficulty grasping ideas, poor coordination between thought and action, and a sensation as if the psychological sphere is paralyzed. There is marked confusion, wrong words floating kaleidoscopically, mistakes in writing and spelling, and an inability to process new ideas especially in the morning. Mental exertion aggravates all symptoms while physical exertion relieves them.
profile.emotional_pattern: Great irritability alternating with mental depression and indifference to surroundings. Hypersensitive to excitement, scolding, and shock—which can trigger convulsions or fainting—with a baseline of nervous restlessness, tingling anxiety, and hysterical tendencies particularly around sexual activity and the menstrual period.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, rumbling: Flatus; distressing belching; great tympanites; rumbling; turmoil in abdomen; offensive flatus; rumbling and gurgling in belly. Everything ferments; rumbling and loud rolling; pinching colic.
rubric_passages.Back: The back has many peculiar and general guiding symptoms. Stiffness of the whole spine. Feeling as if it would break when he attempts to bend. Feels as if something is so tight that it will break when he stoops. Tightness in the muscles of the back. Tingling deep in the spine.
rubric_passages.Back, coldness: Chilliness over the back, crawling, creeping and formication. Numbness of skin over the back.
rubric_passages.Back, coldness, extending, down back: Sensation as if cold air were spreading along the back like an aura epileptica.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Violent, shooting, burning pains. Pain along the spine, worse by stooping. Pains of all sorts in the spine. Pains go up the back and down the back. Sensitiveness of the spine to touch, especially in the back of the peck and dorsal region between the scapulae.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Desire to urinate as urgent as the desire for stool. Dribbling of urine. A peculiar feature of this remedy is that the urine feels cold on passing; while the urine dribbles, can count the cold drops along the urethra.
rubric_passages.Chest: Agaricus is a great remedy in chest troubles, though seldom thought of. It has cured what seemed to be consumption. Catarrhal condition of the chest, with-night sweats and history of the nervous symptoms.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: The remedy is full of nervous palpitation; worse in the evening. It cures shocks and thrills in the heart; spasms of the heart; internal manifestations of its jerking symptoms.
rubric_passages.Chill: He is always chilly. The patient is extremely nervous and sensitive to cold.
rubric_passages.Extremities: In the limbs in general there are twitchings; they are numb, choreic; burning here and there; cold feelings in spots, paralyzed. Trembling of limbs, hands, awkwardness of all the movements. Rheumatism and gout of joints.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: Growing pains in children and they must sit at the fire or the extremities will get cold. Burning itching of the hands as if frozen. In the smaller joints, where the circulation is feeble, there are frostbite symptoms.
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis: Paralysis of the lower limbs. Trembling and weakness of the lower limbs. Paralytic weakness in the lower limbs soon after becoming pregnant. This comes with every pregnancy and she must go to bed.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The most striking things running through this medicine are twitchings and tremblings, jerkings of the muscles and trembling of the limbs; quivering and tremors, everywhere these two features are present in all parts of the body and limbs.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Those slender, nervous, restless women with tingling and creeping, must have Agaricus. During menses, headache, toothache, etc. All the general symptoms are worse during the menstrual period, not to any great extent before or after.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: The routine prescriber always thinks of Puls., Sep., etc., for bearing-down pains in the female, but in a woman with spinal irritation, etc., with the dragging-down sensation as if the parts would drop into the world, this remedy is the best.
rubric_passages.Head: It is a common feature for the headaches of this remedy to be associated with the spinal symptoms, the quivering and jerking. Headaches in spinal patients. Pain as though sharp ice touched the head, or as if from cold needles.
rubric_passages.Mind: Great changeability, irritability, mental depression and complaints which come on from overexertion of the mind and prolonged study. The brain seems to be developed tardily.
rubric_passages.Mouth: The teeth feel too long and are sensitive to touch. The tongue quivers, twitches, jerks and causes disorderly speech; articulates violently. Tongue, dry, tremulous. Learns to speak with difficulty. Spasms of the tongue, inarticulate speech.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Morning diarrhea, great deal of hot flatus (Aloe), with burning in the rectum; soft stool, great tenesmus; urging to stool violent; involuntary straining before, during and after stool.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: Sensation as if rectum would burst, even after stool (Merc. and Sul.). Violent, sudden pains; can't wait; distressing, bursting sensation.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain, burning: Morning diarrhea, great deal of hot flatus (Aloe), with burning in the rectum. During stool, colic and passing of flatus; burning, soreness, smarting and cutting in anus.
rubric_passages.Skin: Itching of the skin all over which changes place from scratching. No place is exempt from this. There are strange sensations here and there upon the skin or in parts, cold sensations, sensations of cold needles and of hot needles; stinging and burning where the circulation is feeble, about the ears, nose, back of hands and fingers and toes, red spots with itching and burning as if frostbitten.
rubric_passages.Sleep: All jerkings and twitchings subside during sleep.
rubric_passages.Sleep, sleepiness: In the morning he is tired and sluggish and this may last till noon.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Burning thirst, ravenous appetite. Gnawing in stomach as if from hunger, without desire for food.
rubric_passages.Appetite, increased (hunger in general): Burning thirst, ravenous appetite. Gnawing in stomach as if from hunger, without desire for food.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations: Flatus; distressing belching. These shocks come from sudden noise; from eructations.
rubric_passages.Vertigo: There is vertigo when walking in the open air. Vertigo and confusion of mind are mixed up.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Before stool, cutting and pinching in abdomen; urgent tenesmus; painful straining in rectum. Horribly foetid discharge. Tympanitic condition marked in typhoid. Pinching colic.

profile.personality: A broken, depleted individual who has exhausted their vital force through sexual excesses and secret vice. They are pale, sickly, prematurely aged, and present as sad, quiet mortals who avoid exertion and prefer to remain still.
profile.mental_state: Marked loss of memory and mental power, with an inability to concentrate or retain information. Deep despair and suicidal thoughts pervade the mind, accompanied by persistent anxiety, fear, and a sense of irreversible decline.
profile.emotional_pattern: Overwhelming sadness and self-reproach over a misspent life, with a woebegone, lamenting disposition. Peevishness and irritability surface alongside a core of hopelessness, as the patient feels heart-broken and beyond recovery.

rubric_passages.Extremities: The limbs are tired and cold.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: The limbs are tired and cold.
rubric_passages.Generalities: He is sensitive to cold, and wants to remain quiet. Exertion and motion intensify his complaints.
rubric_passages.Rectum: There is a growing weakness of the rectum and constipation, and he presses hard at stool, which often fails and slips back, like Silica, Sanic and Thuja.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: The abdominal viscera hang down as a weight.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Tearing pains of head, face and teeth.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: He is growing increasingly flatulent. The abdominal viscera hang down as a weight.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain: The limbs are tired and cold.
rubric_passages.Genitalia male: He has had gonorrhoea; he has lived in excesses, and now suffers from relaxed and cold genitalia, emissions, prostatic discharge at stool.
rubric_passages.Genitalia male, sexual passion, diminish: His young and beautiful wife excites no erection, though only recently he had a clandestine success, and he has morning erections but no more.
rubric_passages.Urethra: He has had gonorrhoea; he has lived in excesses, and now suffers from relaxed and cold genitalia, emissions, prostatic discharge at stool.
rubric_passages.Genitalia male, sexual passion: His young and beautiful wife excites no erection, though only recently he had a clandestine success, and he has morning erections but no more.
rubric_passages.Genitalia male, penis: now suffers from relaxed and cold genitalia, emissions, prostatic discharge at stool.
rubric_passages.Genitalia male, testes: now suffers from relaxed and cold genitalia

profile.personality: A deeply prostrated and stupefied individual who appears benumbed and disconnected from reality. They exist in a dreamy, semi-conscious state where the boundary between waking life and dream dissolves, and past experiences feel as though they belonged to someone else or were merely read about.
profile.mental_state: Marked by profound mental confusion, constant forgetfulness, and inability to concentrate or answer questions correctly. There is a progressive deterioration from initial anxiety and restlessness into stupor, muttering delirium, and eventual complete unconsciousness. Memory is severely impaired, with events spoken of moments ago immediately lost from the mind.
profile.emotional_pattern: The emotional trajectory moves from early anxiety, restlessness, and continual sighing with depression of spirits to later indifference and complete emotional withdrawal. The individual is extremely irritable when still responsive, with a pervasive sense of distress visible in the countenance, and children in this state cry continuously.

rubric_passages.Mind: A continued dreamy state of mind though awake. Child cries all the time. Sees little animals like rats running around. Feels a rat or something small crawling up the limb and over the body. There seems to be constant loss of memory, even the things spoken of a moment ago go right out of the mind. Constant forgetfulness. All past events are forgotten. Past events are forgotten or remembered as belonging to someone else, or as matters read.
rubric_passages.Mouth: From the mouth and nose come foetid odors.
rubric_passages.Skin: "Irregular, patchy, livid eruption, disappearing on pressure and returning very slowly; interspersed with small vesicles, worse on forehead, head, neck and chest."
rubric_passages.Clinical: Dr. Wells used this remedy in a number of cases, as it was at that time an epidemic remedy for scarlet fever, in Brooklyn, and many patients were saved by it. It seemed to be able to change the character of the malignant forms of scarlet fever into a mild type.
rubric_passages.Face: "Face dark as mahogany." Purple, bloated and puffed, besotted face.
rubric_passages.Throat: "Throat much swollen, dark red, almost purple in color. Diphtheria with extreme prostration. Throat livid, swollen; tonsils prominent and studded with deep ulcers."
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain: "During chill hunger, empty feeling, intolerable pain in back of neck, upper part of back and hip joint."
rubric_passages.Face, expression: "Great prostration and a countenance indicating much distress."
rubric_passages.Throat, discoloration: "Throat much swollen, dark red, almost purple in color." "Throat livid, swollen; tonsils prominent and studded with deep ulcers."
rubric_passages.Fever: "Chill at 8 A.M. with chill, heat and sweat." During the chill vomiting of food and piercing pain over the hip. Chill is preceded by malignant eruption, especially on the face and forehead.
rubric_passages.Nose: "Pupils widely dilated; copious, thin, ichorous and bloody, discharge from the nose." "Nostrils congested."
rubric_passages.Skin, eruptions: "Eruption plentiful, of a bluish tint. Typhoid scarlatina." "Eruption is slow to make its appearance, remains livid." "Body and limbs covered with an irregular patchy eruption of a very livid color."
rubric_passages.Throat, ulcers: "Throat livid, swollen; tonsils prominent and studded with deep ulcers."
rubric_passages.Clinical, ulcers: as soon as the blisters break ulceration will take place if the child live long enough; but these are the deadly cases, the malignant type.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain, burning: "Burning in the palms and soles, hunts to find a cool place to put them."
rubric_passages.Face, expression, anxious: There is in the earlier stages of this zymotic state great anxiety and restlessness. "Great prostration and a countenance indicating much distress."
rubric_passages.Nose, coryza: "Pupils widely dilated; copious, thin, ichorous and bloody, discharge from the nose." "Nostrils congested."

profile.personality: A physically sensitive individual who is strongly affected by environmental conditions, particularly cold damp winds and warm enclosed spaces. They tend toward congestive, catarrhal states and are generally better in open air, restless and uncomfortable when confined indoors.
profile.mental_state: Mental faculties are dulled by congestive headaches and the overwhelming nature of acute catarrhal symptoms. There is a dread and apprehension of the next coughing episode, as the patient knows the tearing laryngeal pain it will bring. Concentration is impaired by the fullness, throbbing, and photosensitivity that accompany their complaints.
profile.emotional_pattern: The emotional state is one of acute distress and helplessness driven by intense physical suffering, particularly the excoriating nasal discharge and tearing laryngeal pain. In children, this manifests as screaming from colicky pains and shuddering with dread before each cough. The overall emotional tone is one of raw vulnerability and sensitivity rather than irritability or anger.

rubric_passages.Generalities: The patient and all the phases of his 'cold,' his coryza, his laryngitis, his cough, all his complaints, are aggravated by warmth, are worse in a warm room. Most of the symptoms are worse in the evening, the symptoms of coryza, the 'cold,' and the general symptoms.
rubric_passages.Head: Dull frontal headaches, occipital headaches; headaches very severe and the eyes cannot stand the light; tearing, bursting, throbbing in the head.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Allium cepa also cures a ragged, sensitive condition of the anus, with bleeding, in infants.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It will wipe out an attack of hay fever in a few days, when the symptoms agree. Allium cepa is a wonderful remedy in whooping cough. Cepa has a record for croupy cough. Another affection over which this remedy has marvellous power is traumatic neuritis, often met with in a stump after amputation.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: Cutting, rending, tearing pains, drawing the poor little thing almost double. It screams with the violent cutting in the lower abdomen.
rubric_passages.Head, pain: Pains through the jaws, in the face; and these pains extend into the head. Dull frontal headaches, occipital headaches; headaches very severe and the eyes cannot stand the light; tearing, bursting, throbbing in the head.
rubric_passages.Eye: The discharge from the eye is bland. Although there is burning in the eyes the tears do not excoriate as they flow down over the cheek.
rubric_passages.Eye, lachrymation: Profuse, bland lachrymation. Lachrymation in the evening in a warm room.
rubric_passages.Eye, pain: Although there is burning in the eyes the tears do not excoriate as they flow down over the cheek.
rubric_passages.Larynx and trachea: Violent inflammation of the larynx coming on very rapidly, with that cough I spoke of, and the tearing in the larynx.
rubric_passages.Larynx and trachea, voice, hoarseness: Tickling in the larynx with hoarseness.
rubric_passages.Larynx and trachea, voice: Acute complaints of the voice; catarrhal hoarseness; copious expectoration of mucus from the larynx.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, colic: Colicky pains beginning in the hepatic region and spreading over the whole abdomen, worse around the navel; worse when sitting.
rubric_passages.Clinical, colic: We all know what a flatulent vegetable the onion is. It is a wonderful medicine for babies with colic.
rubric_passages.Cough: Hoarse, harsh, ringing, spasmodic cough, excited by constant tickling in the larynx; cough produces a raw, splitting pain in the larynx, so acute and so severe as to compel the patient to crouch from suffering and to make every effort to suppress the cough.
rubric_passages.Cough, tickling: Cough, excited by tickling in the larynx and when lying down at night in a warm room.
rubric_passages.Generalities, mucous secretions increase: Rawness in the nose, copious flow of water from the eyes; copious watery discharge from the nose. Copious expectoration of mucus from the larynx.
rubric_passages.Nose: A watery discharge drips from the nose constantly, burns like fire, and excoriates the upper lip and the wings of the nose until there are rawness and redness. Notice that the fluid from the nose is excoriating and the fluid from the eyes bland.
rubric_passages.Clinical, inflammation: Violent inflammation of the larynx coming on very rapidly.
rubric_passages.Larynx and trachea, tickling: The tickling in the larynx, which is sometimes aggravated by drawing in cold air. A warm draft will so increase the tickling that it is sure to set the patient coughing.
rubric_passages.Larynx and trachea, larynx in general: Rawness in the larynx and throat, extending down into the chest. Some will describe it as a sensation as if something were being torn loose. Those who describe more accurately will say that it feels as if a hook were dragging up through the larynx with every cough.
Cough and difficult breathing from inspiring cold-air, yet a warm draft will so increase the tickling that it is sure to set the patient coughing. So the cough is aggravated both by cold air and a warm room.
rubric_passages.Cough, hacking: Severe, laryngeal cough, which compels the patient to grasp the larynx; feels as if cough would tear it.
rubric_passages.Cough, hacking, tickling in larynx, from: Hoarse, harsh, ringing, spasmodic cough, excited by constant tickling in the larynx; cough produces a raw, splitting pain in the larynx.
rubric_passages.Cough, hoarse: Hoarse, harsh, ringing, spasmodic cough, excited by constant tickling in the larynx.

profile.personality: The Aloe personality is that of an irritable, excitable individual who becomes desperate and agitated under the influence of pain, particularly abdominal colic. They are misanthropic by nature, repelling others and preferring solitude, with a general disinclination to move or engage with the world.
profile.mental_state: The mental state is characterized by a deep weariness of life, with the feeling that life is a burden and a foreboding sense of approaching death. There is mental dullness and few distinguishing intellectual symptoms, suggesting a constitution where physical suffering dominates and overwhelms the mental sphere.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional pattern revolves around despair driven by physical distress, particularly the intense colicky pains that drive the patient to extremes of irritability and excitability. There is a pronounced hatred of people and a desire to repel everyone, combined with a passive hopelessness and resignation that colors their entire emotional life.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: Feeling of weakness in abdomen as if diarrhea would result.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Aloe, much like Aesculus, has a peculiar engorgement of the veins, causing stiffness and fullness throughout the body, but the greatest disturbance is in the veins of the portal system, with great fullness in the region of the liver, and abdominal, rectal and intestinal fullness.
rubric_passages.Head: The head congestion, which occurs during the bowel disturbance, is a sort of venous stasis such as is found in the portal system.
rubric_passages.Mind: The Aloe patient is extremely excitable when under the influence of pain, and the pains are generally in the abdomen. Colic-like pains, flatulent pains in the abdomen, that drive to despair; be becomes extremely irritable and excited in his attacks of colic.
rubric_passages.Rectum: In the constipation the stool is lumpy, like marbles. Sometimes these little nodules remain in the rectum a long time without any urging to stool, and finally escape unconsciously, being found in the clothing. Entire loss of sensation in the anus, an anesthesia; no feeling during the passage of the stool.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: In the constipation the stool is lumpy, like marbles. Sometimes these little nodules remain in the rectum a long time without any urging to stool, and finally escape unconsciously, being found in the clothing.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: Itching and burning in anus, preventing sleep.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain, burning: There is a sensation of dryness, burning and excoriation about the anus.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Pains about the navel that shoot down towards the rectum, cutting like knives.
rubric_passages.Clinical, paralysis: There is a lack of control of the sphincter. Entire loss of sensation in the anus, an anesthesia; no feeling during the passage of the stool.
rubric_passages.Clinical: Aloe cured a case of stricture of the rectum in which it was indicated by this symptom. The stricture prevented nearly all the faecal matter from getting down to the anus, but the rectum would fill up three or four times a day and compel the patient to expel a quantity of jelly-like mucus.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: Perhaps one of the most striking features of the abdominal state is the fullness, distension and rumbling. It seems as if the abdomen would burst and the rumbling is so great that it can be heard by anyone in the room.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, weakness: Feeling of weakness in abdomen as if diarrhea would result. The weakness is sometimes very great, so much so that he is compelled to go to bed with the diarrhea.
Every mouthful of food hurries him to stool; drinking water will often hurry him to stool.
rubric_passages.Head, pain: Headache across forehead. Headaches aggravated from heat, ameliorated from cold applications.
rubric_passages.Generalities, eating: Soon after supper growling in abdomen. There are colicky pains in the bowels from eating and drinking when there is no diarrhea, even when there is a state of constipation.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, distension: With the Aloe diarrhea the abdomen is distended with gas, causing a feeling of fullness and tightness, and he must go often to stool.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, flatulence: The abdomen seems to be as much distended as ever even after great quantities of flatus have passed. There is no relief.
rubric_passages.Eye: Much heat in the orifices of the body; the eyes, mouth and throat are hot and burn.
rubric_passages.Urine: venous oozings from the nose, the bowels, the bladder; bleeding in general.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, colic: Colic-like pains, flatulent pains in the abdomen, that drive to despair; be becomes extremely irritable and excited in his attacks of colic.
rubric_passages.Clinical, colic: Diarrhoea from eating oysters out of season. if you notice those who get sick have a cholera-like trouble from eating oysters in the hot season, you will find that that is where Aloe is the remedy.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain, cramping, griping: cutting, cramping pains around the navel. Twisting and griping pain in the upper abdomen, around the navel, compelling him to sit bent up which relieves.
rubric_passages.Mind, work, aversion to mental: Disinclined to move. Life is a burden.
rubric_passages.Rectum, diarrhea: In the attacks of diarrhea there is gushing of thin, yellow, offensive, excoriating feces, which burn like fire, and the anus is sore.
rubric_passages.Rectum, hemorrhoids: Don't forget Aloe for hemorrhoids that form like a bunch of grapes.
rubric_passages.Mind, work: Disinclined to move. Life is a burden.

profile.personality: A sluggish, weakened constitution prone to deep-seated chronic illness. The Alumen type is characterized by profound muscular and vascular torpor, with a general slowing down of all bodily functions that reflects an inner state of exhaustion and low vitality. These individuals are sensitive to cold and weather changes, and tend toward a scrofulous, psoric disposition.
profile.mental_state: The mental symptoms are notably underdeveloped in provings, suggesting a person whose pathology is predominantly physical rather than intellectual. There is an implied mental dullness and sluggishness that mirrors the pervasive bodily paralysis, with a heaviness and pressing sensation in the head as if the skull were being crushed inward. The patient is restless at night, kept awake by rushing sensations of blood through the body, indicating anxious inner turmoil beneath an outwardly inert presentation.
profile.emotional_pattern: The emotional landscape is one of quiet suffering and endurance, with a corpse-like pallor and blue lips reflecting deep vital depletion. There is a passive resignation to chronic, worsening conditions rather than active distress, consistent with someone whose vital force has been gradually overwhelmed. The tendency to induration on every level suggests a constitutional pattern of hardening and withdrawal in response to repeated insult, a person who absorbs suffering inwardly rather than expressing it.

rubric_passages.Genitalia female: weight of uterus presses down collum; granulations of vagina; leucorrhoea copious; emaciation; yellow complexion; indurations of uterus, even scirrhus; ulcers of uterus.
rubric_passages.Rectum: In the rectum there is ulceration with bleeding from the ulcers. The hemorrhoids ulcerate and they are very painful, so that after every stool he has prolonged suffering, a dull aching pain in the rectum.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: In the constipation there may be some urging to stool without result or he may go several days without desire. There is no ability to expel the stool. He will strain a long time with no success, and finally after many days the stool is passed and is an agglomeration of hard balls, large masses of little bard balls like marbles all fastened together.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: The intestines do not perform their work, they take on spasmodic action, and consequently the patient suffers from cramps and colicky pains; boring, rending, tearing pains.
rubric_passages.Clinical: Alumen is a great remedy to overcome lead colic in those who work in lead; it removes the susceptibility.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: Under abdomen we find flatulence. The intestines do not perform their work, they take on spasmodic action, and consequently the patient suffers from cramps and colicky pains; boring, rending, tearing pains. Retraction of the abdomen and drawing in of the navel.
rubric_passages.Stool: Stool: less frequent, dryer and harder; large black, hard or in small pieces like sheep's dung; no relief afterwards.
rubric_passages.Stool, hard: finally after many days the stool is passed and is an agglomeration of hard balls, large masses of little bard balls like marbles all fastened together.
rubric_passages.Throat: Uvula inflamed and enlarged. Predisposed to tonsillitis.
rubric_passages.Urine: The bladder is also slowed down in its action, and it is with great difficulty that the urine is voided. After urinating, the bladder often remains half full. The urine is very slow to start, and when the patient stands to urinate the urine falls down perpendicularly, as in Hepar.
rubric_passages.Cough: Dry cough in evening after lying down. Chronic morning cough.
rubric_passages.Expectoration: Expectoration of much yellow mucus; scraping of the throat all the time to get rid of a little accumulation of yellow mucus.
rubric_passages.Cough, evening: Dry cough in evening after lying down.
rubric_passages.Expectoration, viscid: Alumen has been very useful in the treatment of old people who morning expectoration, catarrh of the chest, suffer from copious, ropy, haemoptysis and great weakness of the chest, so that it is difficult to expel the mucus.
rubric_passages.Nose: Nasal polypus left side. Lupus or cancer on the nose.
rubric_passages.Clinical, inflammation: All remedies that have this in their nature relate more or less to cancerous affections, because in cancer we have as the most natural feature a tendency to induration.
rubric_passages.Clinical, ulcers: Ulcers are common in Alumen, and this induration underlies the ulcer; ulcers with indurated base.
rubric_passages.Cough, evening, bed, in: Dry cough in evening after lying down.
rubric_passages.Larynx and trachea, voice, lost: Voice entirely lost. Chronic loss of the voice from a low state of the economy and from always taking fresh colds.
rubric_passages.Throat, inflammation: Uvula inflamed and enlarged. Predisposed to tonsillitis.
rubric_passages.Throat, inflammation, tonsils: For those who have a tendency to colds which settle in the throat, especially singling out the tonsils and indurating these; those who keep on taking cold and the tonsils keep on growing, and indurating, we have in Alumen a medicine that fits the whole process, the hardening and infiltration, and it cures these cases according to the law of similars, when the symptoms agree.
rubric_passages.Urethra: chronic painless gonorrhoea. When a patient is suffering from a chronic gonorrhoea, instead of the discharge becoming white as in a gleet it remains yellow, and there are little indurations along the urethra, which the patient will call the physicians attention to as "Jumps". Discharge with "little bunches" along the urethra. These are little ulcers, and beneath the ulcers are indurations.
rubric_passages.Throat, tonsils: It cures young children growing up with enormously enlarged and very hard tonsils in whom every cold settles in the throat.
rubric_passages.Cough, evening, bed: Dry cough in evening after lying down.
rubric_passages.Expectoration, stringy: Alumen has been very useful in the treatment of old people who morning expectoration, catarrh of the chest, suffer from copious, ropy, haemoptysis and great weakness of the chest, so that it is difficult to expel the mucus.

profile.personality: A slow, exhausted, broken-down constitution marked by profound sluggishness in both mind and body. The Alumina patient is feeble, worn out, and operates as if everything is a burden, with all processes—mental, physical, and neurological—running at diminished capacity.
profile.mental_state: Marked confusion of identity and intellect, feeling as though another person is speaking or seeing through them, with an inability to effect decisions or follow a train of thought. The mind is sluggish and bewildered, especially upon waking, with mistakes in writing and speaking, and a growing fear of losing reason that may progress to genuine mental deterioration.
profile.emotional_pattern: Incessantly sad, moaning, and fretful, with alternating moods between quiet placidity and states of intense anxiety, hurry, and apprehensiveness about the future. Disturbing impulses arise at the sight of sharp instruments or blood, causing shuddering, alongside a restless desire to escape their current situation in hopes that things will be better elsewhere.

rubric_passages.Back: The next most striking features will be in connection with the back and limbs, and I have spoken of these in general way. Burning in the spine; much pain in the back. Burning and stitching pains in the back.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Pain in the back, as if a hot iron was thrust through lower vertebrae.
rubric_passages.Bladder: The paralytic state runs through the remedy and is observed in various parts in many ways. The bladder manifests it in the slowness with which the urine passes. A woman sits a long time before the flow starts, with inability to press, and then the stream flows slowly.
rubric_passages.Chest: Soreness of the chest which is much increased by talking. There is weakness of the muscular power of the chest. The lungs seem weak and the chest has a sensation of weakness in it. Jar increases the misery of the chest.
rubric_passages.Chill: Slight chill in morning. Chill with thirst.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Pain in sole of foot on stepping, as though it were too soft and swollen. Numbness of heel when stepping. Trembling of knees, this is a mere matter of the general weakness. Limbs go to sleep when sitting.
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis: One-sided paralysis, especially of the extensors. Rheumatic and traumatic paralysis in gouty patients.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Want of bodily irritability. Great exhaustion of strength, especially after walking in open air. Slow, tottering gait as after severe illness.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: An instance of this is the leucorrhoea; copious, acrid or excoriating, yellow leucorrhoea; leucorrhoea so copious that it runs down the thighs, making the parts red and inflamed. Ulceration about the os. The mucous membranes are weak and patulous and ulcerate easily. All the parts are in a state of weakness.
rubric_passages.Head: There are many headaches with nausea and vomiting. The headaches come whenever he takes cold. This probably is due to the catarrhal state.
rubric_passages.Mind: It especially takes hold of the intellect and so confuses the intelligence that the patient is unable to effect a decision; the judgment is disturbed. He is unable to realize; the things that he knows or has known to be real seem to him to be unreal, and he is in doubt as to whether they are so or not.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: When he sees sharp instruments or blood, impulses rise up within him and he shudders because of these impulses. An instrument that could be used for murder or for killing causes these impulses to arise; impulse to kill herself. The Alumina patient is very sad, constantly sad. Incessantly moaning; groaning, worrying, fretting and in a hurry.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Its tone is lost and there is inability to perform the ordinary straining when sitting at stool, and so paretic is the rectum that it may be full and distended, and the quantity of faeces enormous, and yet, though the stool is soft, there is constipation.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: She must wait a long time, though there is fullness and she has gone many days without stool; she has the consciousness that she should pass a stool and is conscious of the fullness in the rectum, yet she will sit a long time and finally will undertake to help herself by pressing down violently with the abdominal muscles, straining vigorously, yet conscious that very little effort is made by the rectum itself.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: He suffers greatly from constipation, he does much straining, the mucous membrane is thickened and swollen, and hence we have a fissure.
rubric_passages.Respiration: The most striking things we come to now are the cough and chest troubles. There is expectoration in some of the coughs, but the cough is usually a constant, dry, hacking cough one of those troublesome lingering coughs that has existed for years.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: The cough is hard, a continued dry hacking, and she coughs until she loses her breath and vomits, and loses the urine.
rubric_passages.Skin: The patient is subject to all sorts of eruptions. The skin withers, becomes dry and is subject to eruptions, thickening, indurations, ulcerations, cracking and bleeding. The eruptions itch worse in the warmth of the bed. The skin itches, even when there is no eruption, when becoming warm in bed, so that he scratches until the skin bleeds.
rubric_passages.Sleep: There are all sorts of dreams and disturbances in sleep, so that the sleep may be quite disturbed and restless. Unrefreshing sleep, waking up with palpitation of the heart. Many dreams and frequent awaking; starts in affright; muttering or crying.
rubric_passages.Sleep, sleepiness: It occurs to me to throw out a little hint... she says that it is impossible for her to read a line without going to sleep; that she can sleep all the time.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Now the digestion has practically given out in this medicine. He is subject to catarrh of the stomach, to ulceration of the stomach, to indigestion from the simplest food. Sour and bitter eructations. Vomiting of food, mucus or bile. Nausea, vertigo, heartburn, much flatulence.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Colic and paralytic weakness in lead workers, painters and artists and in those who are so sensitive to lead that from using hair wash containing lead they are paralyzed.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: Urine voided while straining at stool, or cannot pass urine without such straining. The patient will say she cannot hurry the flow of urine. The urine is slow to start and slow to flow, and sometimes only dribbles. At times it is retained and dribbles involuntarily.
rubric_passages.Generalities, faintness: If that patient in addition to what she has said tells you that she is in the habit of fainting when standing any length of time, that she is disturbed in a close room and has all sorts of complaints in the cold air, it is Nux moschata.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Pains in limbs as if bones were squeezed narrower, with pressure in the joints.
rubric_passages.Clinical, paralysis: The paralytic state begins as a sort of a semi-paralysis, for a long time merely an inactivity, which grows at length into a complete paralytic condition. Everything is slowed down. The conductivity of the nerves is impaired so that a prick of a pin upon the extremities is not felt until a second or so afterwards.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side: One-sided paralysis, especially of the extensors.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: There is a state of weakness of the muscles supplied by these nerves; weakness over the whole body. There is difficulty in swallowing, a paralytic condition of the oesophagus; difficulty in raising or moving the arms; paralysis of one side of the body, or paralysis of the muscles of the lower extremities, or of the bladder and rectum.

profile.personality: A prematurely aged individual who appears senile beyond their years, with trembling, tottering, and a dreamy, forgetful state of mind. They are excitable yet fundamentally weak, often lean and nervous, manifesting a broken-down constitution that suggests someone in decline far earlier than expected.
profile.mental_state: The mind flits restlessly from subject to subject with a fleeting inquisitiveness, asking questions without waiting for answers and unable to concentrate, yet simultaneously compelled to dwell on disagreeable thoughts, hideous imaginations, and false faces that cannot be dismissed. Concentration requires unusual effort as ideas vanish, and there is a pervasive confusion and brain fag that worsens in the morning and progresses toward a semi-dreamy insanity by evening.
profile.emotional_pattern: Alternates between vehement irritability and deep melancholic depression, with profound indifference to joy, grief, and people that would normally move a well-balanced person. Intensely embarrassed and aggravated by the presence of others and by conversation, with flushing, trembling, and nervous excitement in company, ultimately settling into sadness, despair, and a loathing of life.

rubric_passages.Back: music makes him tremble, aggravates his mental symptoms and gives him pain in the back as from a hammer.
rubric_passages.Chest: He complains a great deal of tearing pressure deep in the left side of the chest. Sensation of rawness in the chest and itching in the chest. Titillation and itching, moving about here and there if he tries to touch the place and scratch it.
rubric_passages.Chill: Coldness, trembling and stiffness of the extremities.
rubric_passages.Extremities: The limbs easily become numb; pressed upon in the slightest manner they go to sleep; go to sleep on being crossed. Coldness, trembling and stiffness of the extremities. The finger nails become brittle and are shriveled.
rubric_passages.Generalities: We recognize trembling and a peculiar kind of feebleness that cannot be described by any expression but senility; it is not the confusion of mind belonging to sickness, but the peculiar state we recognize in old people, in declining life; trembling and tottering and a dreamy state of mind with forgetfulness.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Copious discharge of blood between the menstrual periods. Discharge of blood between periods at every little accident. Discharge of blood from the vagina from pressing at hard stool; even from a walk that is a little too long or from too great exertion.
rubric_passages.Head: Pressing headache starting from both temples, drawing and tearing in the head, to and fro. Shooting through the head, lancinating, cutting pains, worse on exertion, better from quiet and lying. Headache when blowing nose.
rubric_passages.Mind: He goes on from one subject to another, asking a question, and, without waiting for it to be answered, asking another. And so he jumps about from one topic to another. It can hardly be said to be confusion, it is a dreamy state of mind, a state of senility.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Dryness of the mouth without thirst.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Frequent ineffectual desire for stool; this makes her very anxious; at this time presence of other persons becomes unbearable.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: Inveterate constipation in old persons, and especially when it is impossible to have anyone near at the time of stool.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Asthmatic dyspnoea from any little exertion, from music, from excitement. Asthma of old people and children, in feeble, tremulous, weakly ones. Whistling chest during breathing.
rubric_passages.Skin: Itching is felt all over the body; itching in all the little openings. It is not very long after these symptoms show themselves before this patient will emaciate and wither until the skin looks like dried beef.
rubric_passages.Sleep: Images, false faces, hideous imaginations, fancies and visions annoy him and keep him awake. In the semi-dreamy state he is kept holding up before his mind these grimaces.
rubric_passages.Sleep, sleepiness: Vertigo with feeling of weight on vertex; worse after sleep.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Weakness at the pit of the stomach; after every evacuation; in all-gone feeling in the pit of the stomach.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations: Violent spasmodic cough with frequent eructations and hoarseness. After the normal stool there is pressure in the abdomen or a sense of emptiness and weakness in the abdomen which is better after passing flatus or eructation.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Sometimes these complaints come on in the middle of the night, rousing him up with rumbling and cutting in the bowels.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Shooting through the head, lancinating, cutting pains, worse on exertion, better from quiet and lying.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side: Complaints are often one-sided; perspiration on one side of the body or perspiration on the affected side.
rubric_passages.Clinical: This remedy has cured the premature trembling that comes on in middle-aged persons. It has cured the going to sleep and numbness and feeble circulation with loss of muscular power. It is very suitable in children who are excitable and nervous and weak.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: Distension of the abdomen with great flatulence, especially after eating. The abdomen is cold; it feels as if the whole inside of the abdomen were cold. At other times the coldness seems to be on one side of the abdomen.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: This patient suffers from palpitation of the heart upon slight exertion, from excitement, from music, from any effort to put the mind on anything, with trembling and quivering. And this palpitation he notices even to the extremities; he throbs all over. His extremities pulsate. He is conscious of his arteries everywhere and the palpitation of his heart causes oppression of breathing.
rubric_passages.Head, heat: Listening to music brings on congestion to head. Cough with congestion of blood to the head.
rubric_passages.Sleep, sleeplessness: Images, false faces, hideous imaginations, fancies and visions annoy him and keep him awake.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations, empty: After the normal stool there is pressure in the abdomen or a sense of emptiness and weakness in the abdomen which is better after passing flatus or eructation.
rubric_passages.Generalities, lying: Lying down aggravates uterine symptoms, quite an unexpected thing. The arms go to sleep when lying down. Shooting through the head, lancinating, cutting pains, worse on exertion, better from quiet and lying.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, menses: Menses too early and too profuse. Menses appear seven days before time, and then comes that horrible itching of the genitals; soreness and itching with swelling of labia.
rubric_passages.Mind, dullness: He gets up with confusion and dullness of mind and is in a dreamy state and towards evening he takes on symptoms of insanity.
rubric_passages.Mind, sadness: Great sadness. Melancholy, sits for days weeping. He settles down into a state of melancholy, sadness and despair, and does not want to live. He loathes his life and wants to die.

profile.personality: A deeply sensitive, physically and emotionally depleted constitution prone to nervous prostration and cardiac weakness. The Ammonium Carbonicum type is often a woman of delicate, hysterical temperament who faints easily in close spaces and is profoundly affected by environmental conditions, especially cold, wet weather. There is a fundamental enfeeblement that makes even ordinary exertion like walking feel overwhelming.
profile.mental_state: Mental function is clouded by exhaustion and brain fag, with complaints arising from merely listening to others talk — an oversensitivity to external mental stimulation. The mind is sluggish and weary, reflecting the same prostration seen in the body, and cognitive symptoms worsen in raw, damp weather. There is a vagueness and lack of mental clarity that parallels the weak, almost pulseless physical state.
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by deep depression of spirits with much weeping, anxiety, and uneasiness that worsens with any exertion. There is a pervasive oversensitivity to what others say, leading to emotional injury from overheard conversations. The emotional life is marked by fainting spells, a sense of inner rawness and soreness, and an exhaustion that intensifies around the menstrual period.

rubric_passages.Bladder: This remedy has bleeding of black blood, often fluid blood, that will not coagulate, flowing from the nose, the uterus, the bladder and bowels.
rubric_passages.Chest: The remedy is full of catarrhal symptoms and cough, with much rattling of mucus in the chest and air passages. Oppression of breathing, a catarrhal dyspnoea. Especially is this a remedy, when the symptoms agree, in hypostatic congestion of the lungs, a filling up of the chest with mucus which it is difficult to expel; great rattling in the chest and great weakness.
rubric_passages.Chill: The warmth of the bed relieves the rheumatic pains, relieves the chill.
rubric_passages.Extremities: From washing reappearance of the symptoms; nose-bleed; blue hands; swollen veins.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: Sometimes it is an exhaustion with vomiting, exhaustion as in Veratrum, with coldness, blueness, sinking, dyspnoea.
rubric_passages.Generalities: But Ammonium carb. is a deep-acting, constitutional medicine, an anti-psoric. It effects rapid blood changes, it disturbs the whole economy and it establishes a scorbutic constitution. Its fluids are all acrid.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: It belongs to the simple enfeeblement, weak heart, emaciation. There is quite an absence of symptoms and a lack of response to remedies. The patient must lie in bed because of the palpitation and difficult breathing on motion. It is a matter of mere weakness.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Violent tearing in abdomen and vagina. Irritation of clitoris. Swelling of the genitals. Now, let me tell you something not mentioned here, but important, and that is a sensation of soreness in the whole pelvic viscera; at times it seems as if all her inner parts were raw.
rubric_passages.Head: A congestive headache comes on in wet weather and from weather changes. Sensation as if the brain would ooze out through the forehead and eyes. Pulsating, beating in the forehead as if it would burst.
rubric_passages.Mind: The remedy is full of depression of spirits. She weeps much, has fainting fits, anxiety, uneasiness and exhaustion from motion. Over sensitive about what she hears other people saying. Complaints from listening to others talking.
rubric_passages.Mouth: The saliva becomes acrid and excoriates the lips, so that they crack in the corners and middle, and become raw and dry and scabby.
rubric_passages.Rectum: The stool is acrid and excoriates.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: The stool is acrid and excoriates.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Ammonium carb. has a state analogous to blood poisoning, such as we find in erysipelas and in the most malignant forms of scarlet fever, with prostration, great dyspnoea, so that it seems as if the heart were giving out.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: if the room is warm the dyspnoea increases until suffocation seems imminent; as if he would die for want of breath. He is compelled to go out into the cold air for relief. While the warm room increases the dyspnoea in asthmatic complaints the bodily state of the patient is worse from cold.
rubric_passages.Skin: Body red as if covered with scarlatina. Putrid flat ulcers with a pungent sensation. Malignant scarlatina with somnolence, starting from sleep.
rubric_passages.Sleep: Malignant scarlatina with somnolence, starting from sleep. Erysipelas of old people when cerebral symptoms are developed.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Sometimes it is an exhaustion with vomiting, exhaustion as in Veratrum, with coldness, blueness, sinking, dyspnoea.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Menses premature, abundant, blackish, often in clots, preceded by griping and colic.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: This remedy has bleeding of black blood, often fluid blood, that will not coagulate, flowing from the nose, the uterus, the bladder and bowels.
rubric_passages.Clinical, paralysis: With this there is an unusual patchy condition of the surface, due to the paralytic condition of the blood vessels, enlargement of the glands, duskiness and puffiness of the face.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: Great lassitude. Defective reaction with, or at the close of severe zymotic troubles, typhoid, diphtheria, scarlet fever, erysipelas, etc.

profile.personality: A chilly, physically depleted individual who tends toward pallor and weakness, with a heavy, distended abdomen contrasting with lean limbs. They are long-suffering and slow to recover, often presenting as sickly and feeble with a tendency toward catarrhal conditions and internal sensations of boiling heat.
profile.mental_state: Mentally characterized by fretfulness and a generalized anxiety without clearly defined cause. There is a notable antipathy toward certain persons, suggesting fixed mental irritability and an inability to tolerate specific social contacts.
profile.emotional_pattern: Emotionally reserved yet inwardly agitated, with a simmering discontent that manifests as irritability and aversion rather than overt emotional expression. The emotional state mirrors the physical pattern of internal heat with external coldness, suggesting suppressed frustration in a constitution too depleted to fully express it.

rubric_passages.Back: Violent backache at waist line, worse at night. Coldness between the shoulders.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Violent backache at waist line, worse at night.
rubric_passages.Chest: In catarrhal troubles that extend into the larynx and bronchial tubes, with stitching, tearing, burning. Hoarseness and loss of voice, with burning in the larynx. Constantly scraping white mucus from the larynx. Difficult breathing when using the arms or from manual labor. Weight on the chest in open or cold air. Dry cough from constant tickling in the larynx. Daily recurring suffocating cough. In weakly people going toward phthisis, with daily dry cough and fast pulse.
rubric_passages.Chill: Sensitive to cold. Coldness between the shoulders. Cold feet at night in bed.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Stitching, drawing, tearing in limbs. Drawing in the limbs. Tension in the muscles and tendons of the lower limbs. Tension in posterior part of thighs when walking. Cold feet at night in bed.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The patient frequently feels a boiling throughout the body as if in the blood vessel. Sensitive to cold. Many complaints increase while in the open air. Flushes of heat, ending in sweat. Tearing pains and smarting prevail extensively. Burning and excoriation of mucous membranes. Drawing or sensation of shortening of tendons. It is a long-acting remedy.
rubric_passages.Head: Neuralgic and, rheumatic pains in the head. Tearing pains in the head. Stitching and tearing in the temples. Itching of the scalp and other parts.
