rubric_passages.Rectum: Excoriation and burning of the rectum and anus during and long after stool. Stitching, tearing pains in the perineum. All the salts of ammonia, like this one, have painful hemorrhoids.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: Hard, crumbling stool, most difficult to expel; must use the abdominal muscles.
rubric_passages.Skin: Rash all over body like measles. Itching of the scalp and other parts.
rubric_passages.Sleep: Copious night sweats latter part of night.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Eructations of food as eaten, and vomiting. Sensation of hunger with fullness, which is a flatulent state. Empty feeling, gnawing in the stomach and spleen. Burning, stitching, tearing pains in the abdomen.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: Burning, stitching, tearing pains in the abdomen. Empty feeling, gnawing in the stomach and spleen.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain, gnawing: Empty feeling, gnawing in the stomach and spleen.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Much pain in inguinal region. Pain in abdomen and back during menses. Burning, stitching, tearing pains in the abdomen. Distension from flatus. Much grumbling in the bowels.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Tearing pains and smarting prevail extensively. Burning and excoriation of mucous membranes. Drawing or sensation of shortening of tendons.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It has cured enlarged prostate, also enlarged uterus. It cures capsular cataract, when the symptoms agree.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: Distension from flatus. Much grumbling in the bowels. Much pain in inguinal region. Pain in abdomen and back during menses. The abdomen is fat, relaxed and heavy, and the lower limbs are lean. Burning, stitching, tearing pains in the abdomen.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: The patient frequently feels a boiling throughout the body as if in the blood vessel. Flushes of heat, ending in sweat.
rubric_passages.Generalities, morning: green slimy stools in the morning.
rubric_passages.Head, pain: Neuralgic and, rheumatic pains in the head. Tearing pains in the head. Stitching and tearing in the temples.
rubric_passages.Stool: Hard, crumbling stool, most difficult to expel; must use the abdominal muscles. It cures diarrhea when the stools are like scrapings, bloody and watery; also green slimy stools in the morning.
rubric_passages.Stool, hard: Hard, crumbling stool, most difficult to expel; must use the abdominal muscles.
rubric_passages.Generalities, lying: Violent backache at waist line, worse at night.
rubric_passages.Generalities, bones: Tearing in the bones of the face.
rubric_passages.Generalities, bones, pain: Tearing in the bones of the face.

profile.personality: A deeply conflicted individual torn between opposing impulses, experiencing a fundamental split in their sense of self as though they possess two wills — one inclined toward malice and violence, the other toward conscience and restraint. They are irresolute, hesitant, and unable to decide between good and evil courses of action, often doing nothing as a result. Weak-minded and prone to imbecility, they grope through life as if in a dream where nothing feels real.
profile.mental_state: The mind is feeble, sluggish, and marked by poor memory, with thoughts vanishing moments after they arise and comprehension severely impaired. Hallucinations and fixed ideas dominate — hearing commanding voices, seeing demons, believing oneself to be double, sensing strange forms accompanying on either side. There is a progressive deterioration from illusion to delusion, with alternating moments of clarity and confusion about what is real.
profile.emotional_pattern: Pervaded by internal anxiety, cowardice, and a despairing sense of separation from the world, with paranoid fears of pursuit, thieves, and enemies. Moral feeling is abolished, replaced by cruelty, malice, and an irresistible desire to curse and swear, with inappropriate laughter in serious moments. Morose, sulky, unsocial, and excessively angry from slight causes, swinging between low-spirited despondency and explosive irritability.

rubric_passages.Chill, trembling and shivering: Full of trembling and paralytic weakness.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Sensations as of a hoop or band around the body, limbs or head; pressing as of a plug.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The whole body has been well covered by symptoms; but it seems that the mind represents the principal aspect, and A will seldom be used excepting for such mind symptoms.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: Full of trembling and paralytic weakness.
rubric_passages.Head: Sensation here and there of pressure, described as if a plug, all through the body, in the head, eyes, in the navel and down the spine.
rubric_passages.Mind: This remedy is full of strange notions and ideas. The mind appears to be feeble; almost, if not complete imbecility; seems as if in a dream; everything is strange; slow to comprehend. Marked irritability; disturbed by everything; cursing.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: Marked irritability; disturbed by everything; cursing.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Full of internal anxiety. No peace. He is separated from the whole world, and he despairs to do that which is required of him.
rubric_passages.Skin: The eruptions are like Rhus in many respects; erysipelatous eruptions dark, dusky and of malignant types. It is an antidote to Rhus poisoning. Eruptions all over. Yellow vesicles are common. Intense itching of eruptions. Warts on the palms like Natrum mur. Skin burns much. It seems closely related in its symptoms to all the Rhus family.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Many complaints are ameliorated by eating.
